faqs.question: What deal options are available for the Bared Monkey Laser Spa laser hair removal sessions?
faqs.answer: The Get Smooth: Laser Hair Removal Sessions + Free First Month Membership deal is available in eight options combining either three or six laser hair-removal sessions with a first-month membership. Each session count is offered across four treatment area sizes: Extra-Small, Small, Medium, and Large. Customers can choose the combination that best fits the area they wish to treat.

faqs.question: Where is the Bared Monkey Laser Spa location where this deal can be redeemed?
faqs.answer: This deal can be redeemed at the Bared Monkey Laser Spa Penn Station location, situated at 38 West 32nd Street, New York, NY 10001.

faqs.question: What is the difference between choosing three sessions versus six sessions in the Get Smooth deal?
faqs.answer: The Get Smooth: Laser Hair Removal Sessions + Free First Month Membership deal offers either three or six laser hair-removal sessions on a single treatment area, both paired with a first-month membership. The six-session options provide double the number of treatments compared to the three-session options for the same area sizes.

faqs.question: What area sizes are available for treatment under the Bared Monkey Laser Spa laser hair removal deal?
faqs.answer: Each session package — whether three or six sessions — is available for one of four treatment area sizes: Extra-Small, Small, Medium, or Large. Each deal option applies to a single selected area.

faqs.question: What type of service does the Get Smooth deal at Bared Monkey Laser Spa in New York, NY provide?
faqs.answer: The Get Smooth: Laser Hair Removal Sessions + Free First Month Membership deal provides professional laser hair removal services at Bared Monkey Laser Spa, categorized under Beauty & Spas and Hair Removal. The deal bundles multiple laser hair-removal sessions on a chosen body area with a complimentary first-month membership.
